notes:
disaling d3d11 just caused the ground to disappear (no texture), however using wine d3d11 seems to solve it to normal. I can't attest to crossplatform performance, i let my brother play it. no (abnormal) bugs reported. just the usual windows ones.
ran at low quality settings, but 1080p res. never got around to adjusting settings.
tested a few scenerios, bounced plane through water, threw cars and planes into tornado. no signs of abnormal behaviour.
